title: Box Breathing
steps: Find a comfortable seated position
Inhale slowly through your nose for 4 seconds
Hold your breath for 4 seconds
Exhale slowly through your mouth for 4 seconds
Hold your breath for 4 seconds
Repeat for 5-10 cycles

title: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
steps: Acknowledge 5 things you can see around you
Acknowledge 4 things you can touch
Acknowledge 3 things you can hear
Acknowledge 2 things you can smell
Acknowledge 1 thing you can taste
Take a deep breath and return to the present

title: Gratitude Reflection
steps: Find a quiet space and close your eyes
Think of 3 things you're grateful for today
Reflect on why each one matters to you
Notice how gratitude feels in your body
Write them down if you'd like

title: Tension Release Scan
steps: Sit or lie down comfortably
Starting from your toes, notice any tension
Slowly move your attention up through your body
When you find tension, breathe into that area
Imagine releasing the tension with each exhale
Continue until you reach the top of your head

title: Positive Reframe
steps: Think of a current challenge or worry
Write it down or say it out loud
Ask: What can I learn from this?
Ask: What's one positive aspect of this situation?
Reframe the challenge as an opportunity

title: 2-Minute Mindfulness
steps: Set a timer for 2 minutes
Close your eyes and focus on your breath
Notice the sensation of air entering and leaving
When your mind wanders, gently return to your breath
When the timer ends, slowly open your eyes

title: Progressive Muscle Relaxation
steps: Tense your feet muscles for 5 seconds, then release
Move up to your calves and repeat
Continue with thighs, glutes, stomach, chest
Tense and release shoulders, arms, hands
Finally, tense and release neck and face muscles
Notice the feeling of deep relaxation

title: Three Good Things
steps: Think back over your day
Identify three good things that happened
They can be small or large
For each one, reflect on why it was good
Consider your role in making it happen

title: 4-7-8 Breathing
steps: Exhale completely through your mouth
Close your mouth and inhale through nose for 4 counts
Hold your breath for 7 counts
Exhale completely through mouth for 8 counts
Repeat the cycle 3-4 times

title: Loving-Kindness Practice
steps: Sit comfortably and take a few deep breaths
Silently say: May I be happy, may I be healthy
Think of someone you care about
Say: May you be happy, may you be healthy
Extend this to all people
Notice how compassion feels

title: Nature Connection
steps: Step outside or look out a window
Notice the sky, trees, or any natural elements
Observe colors, shapes, and movements
Take 5 slow, deep breaths
Feel your connection to the natural world

title: Evening Wind-Down
steps: 30 minutes before bed, dim the lights
Put away screens and devices
Do a light stretch or gentle movement
Write down any lingering thoughts
Practice gratitude or box breathing
Prepare your body and mind for rest
